mapper.select: SELECT story_id, collect_id, title, alternative_title, creator, reg_date_raw, collection_db, subject_category, subject_keyword, extent, description, spatial_coverage, temporal_info, person_info, language, source_title, reference_identifier, rights_info, copyright_others, content_url, contributor, hash_key, use_yn, reg_dt, upd_dt FROM tb_nlcf_story WHERE story_id = #{storyId}
